about_text_1: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 20+ years building performant, accessible, and scalable web applications using Vue.js, Nuxt.js, Node.js, and TypeScript. I specialize in translating complex business requirements into high-quality products that users love.
about_text_2: Experienced in designing scalable solutions on AWS with Lambda, API Gateway, and serverless architectures. Growth-driven engineer who has led A/B testing initiatives that improved conversion and built SEO-optimized applications serving 45M+ monthly visitors.
about_text_3: Built and led full stack initiatives that increased test coverage from 30% to 80%+, catching 95% of regressions before deployment. Mentor engineers on code reviews, architecture decisions, and best practices. Embrace AI-assisted development workflows to boost productivity while maintaining quality.
about_text_4: Available for remote roles. I thrive in collaborative, cross-functional product teams where continuous learning and knowledge sharing drive product excellence.
experience_job_capitole: Senior Frontend Developer, Test Automation Engineer and Analyst Programmer
experience_job_text_allianz: Developed customer-facing features for Meine Allianz, serving 2M+ insurance customers across Germany in a cross-functional product team. Contributed to Node.js backend services and API design. Reduced feature delivery cycle by 30% through component architecture improvements and rigorous code review processes.
experience_job_text_lovetoknow: Led full stack development for YourDictionary.com (45M+ monthly visitors) using Vue.js, Nuxt.js, and Node.js on AWS Lambda. Architected the backend with API Gateway and serverless technologies, powering the content delivery layer. Drove growth through A/B testing and SEO optimization, achieving top search rankings for high-competition keywords. Improved Lighthouse performance from 55 to 92+ and reduced Largest Contentful Paint by 60%. Built a shared component library of 40+ reusable Vue components adopted by 3 product teams. Increased automated test coverage from 30% to 78%, catching 95% of regressions. Drove Nuxt 2 to Nuxt 3 migration across 5 micro-frontends with zero downtime. Mentored junior engineers and established code review standards.
experience_job_text_edreams: Owned quality for a high-traffic travel booking platform processing 10M+ daily searches. Built automated testing pipelines that reduced production bugs by 40%. Led A/B testing framework implementation, shipping 20+ experiments that improved conversion by 12%. Reviewed code across 6 engineering teams ensuring consistent standards. Maintained 85%+ test coverage across multiple codebases.
experience_job_text_capitole_1: Developed interactive booking interfaces for a major travel agency platform (Backbone, jQuery, Lodash), serving 500K+ monthly users. Refactored legacy code into modular components, reducing page load time by 35%. (10/2017 - 04/2018)
experience_job_text_capitole_2: Designed and deployed automated test suite (TestComplete + Jenkins CI) for a pharmaceutical compliance system. Cut regression testing from 3 days to 4 hours, achieving 92% automation coverage across 200+ test cases. (01/2017 - 10/2017)
experience_job_text_capitole_3: Architected migration of a legacy banking application to a responsive AngularJS SPA, serving 100K+ corporate banking users. Delivered project on schedule across 6 months, reducing page load times by 50% and enabling mobile access for field agents. (07/2016 - 12/2016)
experience_job_text_fiatc: Designed and built the online insurance sales platform handling 15K+ policies per year across travel assistance and motor insurance. Streamlined the quote-to-purchase flow, reducing drop-off by 25% and cutting average transaction time from 8 to 3 minutes.
experience_job_text_ict: Maintained the organization's public web portal and 3 internal web applications, ensuring 99.5% uptime. Built XML/XSLT publishing pipeline reducing content publication time from 2 days to 4 hours.
experience_job_text_secretariaplus: Developed and maintained ASP-based web application with SQL Server backend managing 10K+ client records. Built data entry interfaces that reduced processing time by 40% for administrative staff.
header_value_proposition: Full Stack Engineer passionate about growth — building scalable products with Vue.js, Nuxt, Node.js, and AWS. Experienced in high-traffic B2C applications, A/B testing, SEO, and AI-assisted engineering.
header_location: Senior Full Stack Engineer | Remote from Barcelona, Spain | Vue.js, Nuxt & Node.js
interests_text_1: I like to create websites for fun, trying out new technologies and tools to improve myself as a developer and stay up to date with current tech.
interests_text_2: Apart from being a frontend developer, I am a gym goer and enjoy training with barbells and iron plates. I also love watching TED talks and I also enjoy binge watching films and series on Netflix (for improving my english skills 😉).
interests_text_3: And during the summer, I enjoy go camping with my family near the sea.
skills_data_text_5: Calculation and analysis in SQL and spreadsheets
skills_workflow_text_4: Project management with Agile Methodologies and Scrum
